moments.title: World Cup Final 2026: Spain vs. Argentina
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates tomorrow with the highly anticipated final between Spain and Argentina at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: All eyes on tomorrow! Spain v Argentina in the World Cup Final. Who are you backing for glory? #WorldCupFinal

angles.name: Pre-match anticipation
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is just hours away! Spain or Argentina – one will lift the World Cup trophy. Get ready!

moments.title: The Open Championship 2026 at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship continues today and concludes tomorrow at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, with the world's best golfers battling for the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Live Golf Action
angles.copy: It's Moving Day at Royal Birkdale! The Open Championship is live today – who's making a charge up the leaderboard?

angles.name: Local Connection
angles.copy: The Open Championship is happening right now at Royal Birkdale! Some of the best golf in the world on our doorstep. Who's your pick to win?

moments.title: New UK Official Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart was updated yesterday, featuring new entries and climbers from artists like SIENNA SPIRO and Sam Fender & Olivia Dean.

angles.name: Chart Recap
angles.copy: New music Friday means a new Official Singles Chart! What's your favourite new entry or climber this week?

angles.name: Weekend Playlist
angles.copy: Your weekend playlist just got an update! Dive into the new UK Official Singles Chart – any surprises at the top?

moments.title: UK Schools Break Up for Summer
moments.blurb: Many schools across England and Wales are breaking up for the summer holidays this weekend or early next week, marking the start of the long break for students.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: SCHOOL'S OUT FOR SUMMER! ☀️ If you're breaking up this weekend, what are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Parent Relief
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially here for many! Parents, you've made it! Kids, enjoy the break! #SummerBreak

angles.name: Welsh Summer
angles.copy: Holidays have landed for many in Wales! What's top of your summer to-do list? #GwyliauHaf

moments.title: Happy 87th Birthday, Dion DiMucci!
moments.blurb: Today, rock and roll pioneer Dion DiMucci, known for hits like 'Runaround Sue' and 'The Wanderer', turns 87.

angles.name: Dion's Big Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the legendary Dion DiMucci! Still 'The Wanderer' at heart. What's your favourite Dion track?

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday, Martha Reeves!
moments.blurb: Motown icon Martha Reeves, lead singer of Martha and the Vandellas, celebrates her 85th birthday today.

angles.name: Motown Queen's Birthday
angles.copy: Dancing in the street (or wherever you are!) for Martha Reeves' 85th birthday today! The Motown legend still sounds incredible.

moments.title: Happy 56th Birthday, Gruff Rhys!
moments.blurb: Welsh musician Gruff Rhys, frontman of Super Furry Animals, turns 56 today.

angles.name: Welsh Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Penblwydd Hapus to the brilliant Gruff Rhys! The Super Furry Animals frontman turns 56 today. What's your favourite of his tracks?

angles.name: Welsh Music Icon
angles.copy: Penblwydd Hapus i'r Gruff Rhys gwych! Mae blaenwr Super Furry Animals yn troi'n 56 heddiw. Beth yw eich hoff gân ganddo?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Carlos Santana!
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, blues, and Latin rhythms, celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: Santana's Sound
angles.copy: Get ready to groove! On Sunday, we're celebrating the 79th birthday of the incredible Carlos Santana. Which Santana track instantly transports you?

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday, Kim Carnes!
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, famous for her raspy voice and the iconic hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', turns 81 on Sunday.

angles.name: 80s Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: On Sunday, we're wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to the distinctive voice of Kim Carnes! 'Bette Davis Eyes' still sounds amazing.

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, John Lodge!
moments.blurb: John Lodge, bassist and vocalist for The Moody Blues, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: Moody Blues Bassist
angles.copy: On Sunday, let's celebrate the 83rd birthday of The Moody Blues' John Lodge! Timeless tunes for a true legend. #TheMoodyBlues

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday, Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam)!
moments.blurb: Influential singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, turns 78 on Monday.

angles.name: Folk Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: On Monday, we celebrate the 78th birthday of the incredible Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam)! Which of his heartfelt songs is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday, George Clinton!
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday on Tuesday.

angles.name: Funk Master's Birthday
angles.copy: Get down with the funk! On Tuesday, we're celebrating the 85th birthday of the legendary George Clinton! What's your go-to P-Funk anthem?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Don Henley!
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of The Eagles, turns 79 on Tuesday.

angles.name: Eagles Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' legendary Don Henley on Tuesday! What's your favourite Eagles track or Don Henley solo hit?

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday, Selena Gomez!
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on Tuesday.

angles.name: Pop Queen's Birthday
angles.copy: It's Selena Gomez's 34th birthday on Tuesday! Celebrate with us by telling us your favourite Selena hit!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, David Essex!
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter, actor, and teen idol David Essex turns 79 on Wednesday.

angles.name: 70s Heartthrob's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary David Essex on Wednesday! What's your favourite of his classic tracks?

moments.title: Happy 65th Birthday, Martin Gore!
moments.blurb: Martin Gore, songwriter and multi-instrumentalist for Depeche Mode, celebrates his 65th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Depeche Mode Mastermind
angles.copy: On Wednesday, a massive Happy 65th Birthday to Depeche Mode's brilliant Martin Gore! Synth-pop royalty. #DepecheMode

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday, Slash!
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses lead guitarist Slash, an undisputed rock icon, turns 61 on Wednesday.

angles.name: Rock God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash on Wednesday! That guitar tone is instantly recognisable. What's your favourite GNR riff?

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, Jennifer Lopez!
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: JLo's Birthday Bash
angles.copy: On Thursday, we're celebrating the 57th birthday of the incredible Jennifer Lopez! Get ready to dance. What's your ultimate JLo anthem?

moments.title: Happy 75th Birthday, Lynval Golding!
moments.blurb: Lynval Golding, guitarist and vocalist for the iconic 2 Tone ska band The Specials, turns 75 on Thursday.

angles.name: Ska Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: A massive Happy 75th Birthday to The Specials' legend, Lynval Golding, on Thursday! Still 'Enjoy Yourself' with his fantastic music.

moments.title: Happy 75th Birthday, Verdine White!
moments.blurb: Verdine White, the dynamic bassist for Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday on Friday.

angles.name: Earth, Wind & Fire Bassist
angles.copy: On Friday, let's celebrate the 75th birthday of the incredible Verdine White from Earth, Wind & Fire! 'September' vibes all day. #EarthWindAndFire
